mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_ledger ( id, user_id, account_id, biz_type, idempotency_key, reference_no, amount, balance_before, balance_after, frozen_before, frozen_after, margin_used_before, margin_used_after, created_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{accountId}, #{bizTypeCode}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{referenceNo}, #{amount}, #{balanceBefore}, #{balanceAfter}, #{frozenBefore}, #{frozenAfter}, #{marginUsedBefore}, #{marginUsedAfter}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, account_id, biz_type, idempotency_key, reference_no, amount, balance_before, balance_after, frozen_before, frozen_after, margin_used_before, margin_used_after, created_at FROM t_ledger WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT id, user_id, account_id, biz_type, idempotency_key, reference_no, amount, balance_before, balance_after, frozen_before, frozen_after, margin_used_before, margin_used_after, created_at FROM t_ledger WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT l.id AS ledger_id, CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(l.reference_no, ':', 2), ':', -1) AS UNSIGNED) AS position_id, p.symbol AS symbol, p.side AS side_code, l.biz_type AS biz_type_code, l.amount AS amount, l.balance_after AS balance_after, SUBSTRING(l.reference_no, LOCATE(':', l.reference_no, LOCATE(':', l.reference_no) + 1) + 1) AS rollover_at_text, l.created_at AS settled_at, l.reference_no AS reference_no FROM t_ledger l LEFT JOIN t_position p ON p.id = CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(l.reference_no, ':', 2), ':', -1) AS UNSIGNED) WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND l.biz_type IN (6, 7) ORDER BY l.created_at DESC, l.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_ledger WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND biz_type IN (6, 7)
SELECT created_at FROM t_ledger WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND biz_type IN (6, 7) AND reference_no LIKE CONCAT('swap:', #{positionId}, ':%') ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
